questions.question: Differentiate between synthesized and inherited attributes with examples.
expectedPoints: Synthesized: computed from children to parent, e.g., expression value computation
Inherited: computed from parent/siblings to children, e.g., type information propagation

questions.question: Explain how Syntax Directed Definitions are used in compiler construction with suitable examples.
expectedPoints: Types of attributes and their computation
Applications: type checking, code generation, symbol table management
Example: expression evaluation or type declaration processing
